description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a golden-brown exterior and a smooth, glossy glaze coating its surface. The glaze appears slightly uneven, with some areas showing thicker white patches and others revealing more of the underlying dough. The donut has a soft, slightly puffy texture, with a well-defined central hole and rounded edges. There are no visible toppings or decorations beyond the glaze, and the surface shows a few minor imperfections typical of hand-glazed pastries. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, bakery-style donut, likely made from wheat flour and fried to achieve its characteristic color and texture.
description: A golden-brown, ring-shaped donut with a glossy, uneven white glaze and a soft, puffy texture.
description_view_0: The donut is seen from a low angle, highlighting the thick glaze and some uneven white patches on the left side.
description_view_1: This view shows a more uniform glaze coverage, with the donut's roundness and central hole clearly visible.
description_view_2: The glaze appears slightly thinner on this side, with more of the golden-brown dough exposed and a smooth surface.
description_view_3: The front of the donut displays a mix of thick and thin glaze, with some white spots and a well-defined central hole.
attribute_icing_type: classic sugar glaze, glossy and unevenly distributed with some thicker white patches
attribute_placement_location: isolated on a plain, neutral background
